nasb.text: O God of hosts, turn again now, we beseech You; Look down from heaven and see, and take care of this vine,

esv.text: Turn again, O God of hosts! Look down from heaven, and see; have regard for this vine,

cnv.text: 萬軍的　神啊！求你回心轉意， 從天上垂看鑒察， 眷顧這葡萄樹，

ccb.text: 万军之上帝啊， 求你回来， 求你在天上垂顾我们这棵葡萄树，

csbs.text: 万军之神哪，求你回转！ 求你从天上垂看鉴察，眷顾这葡萄树，
